name: Daqin Railway Co., Ltd.
summary: Daqin Railway Co., Ltd. provides railway transportation services in the People's Republic of China. It transports coal, coke, and iron and steel ores. The company also offers railway passenger transportation services. It operates 15 passenger routes that cover passenger mileage of 2,187 kilometers, as well as 9 trunk lines. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Datong, the People's Republic of China.
